feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BTP Workzone (standard) update config to allow additional origin
entry.content:
Hi,

Anyone has idea how to configure BTP/BTP Workzone to allow additional origin called from the third-party URL?

Scenario below: Using OCI catalog punch out scenario -> that Workzone hosted the S/4 Standard App- Webdynpro Change maintenance order App will launch a third-party catalog in a new tab when user click on select catalog button in the component screen, and the third-party catalog URL will post the selected data back to SAP via hook URL maintained in the configuration in table WSI_CALLSTRUC.

The hook URL we have maintained the BTP Workzone backend destination URL: for example:
https://<subaccount-host>-sapdelim-s4d05rt500.launchpad.cfapps.ca10.hana.ondemand.com/sap/bc/rest/sap/oci_catalog

where this URL is where we observe how the workzone route other odata Call from workzone to backend S/4.

We are getting the error below from the BTP response after user click submit the cart in the catalog page that trigger to the HOOK_URL.

Note: We found out this error is responded by the BTP, not by the local browser, hence something needs to be done in BTP to allow this origin, not the normal CORS blocked by the common browser scenario.

What we found out further due to the third party will set the HTTP request header "Origin":"https://www.grainger.ca" in the hook URL request that is causing the issue where blocked by BTP/BTP workzone.

We have try simulate the same request from postman, able to get the same error. However, once we remove the Orgin from the HTTP header, it is able to post to the backend with 200 error success.

So far found this note 3169523 - Configure Tenant Security Header for CAI - SAP for Me that is allow us to configure additional origin, but is applicable for CAI only, not for Workzone.

Thanks.

entry.title: Impact of Changing Cost Center on Settlement Rule in IW32 After Order Release
entry.content: In transaction IW32, once the order has been released and a settlement rule has already been assigned, my question is: if I change the cost center in the “Location” – “Account Assignment” view, should this change be reflected in the settlement rule?

entry.title: Maintenance notifications app short dump
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

A new error came up when we tried to use the Find Maintenance Notifications app (F2071).
The error is:

I have already tried to search up for an sap note but I was not succeded.
Can any of you help me?

Thank you! 🙂

entry.title: Settlement In Investment Order
entry.content:
Dear sap experts,

In Plant Maintenance we can create investment order and then after confirmation while trying to do the settlement an error is popping like the investment order cannot be settled to cost center, so I have tried to settle it for the asset by maintaining the g/l accounts in allocation structure even though I am unable to make the settlement possible.

can anyone help me out here.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP WCM PM Configuration
entry.content:
Dear All,

This is related to SAP WCM - Work Permit System in Plant Maintenance.

As per business requirements we need to create more than 9 Applications (work permit) in the WCM.

Can you please help us that this can be possible through configuration or any business function activation.

I am attaching the config screen shot in that mentioned user field, kindly check and suggest further on this.

entry.title: Service Order Planned Costs Changes Visibility
entry.content:
Is there a SAP standard way of displaying changes or tracking changes for planned costs in service orders made from auto batched materials?

When the batch determination is run we have planned costs updating in the service order that that are then  significantly higher than originally displayed; we are talking 000K

But we have no way of seeing where that change has come from, is there log, is there a way to see the changes?

entry.title: How to Restrict Access in SAP Fiori Screen Maintenance Request App
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community

I am working in S/4HANA with the SAP Fiori app Screen Maintenance Request in the Plant Maintenance Module

I want to:
1. Allow some users full access (accept, reject, edit work orders)
2. Allow other users only view access (they can see the request but buttons like Accept/Reject should be greyed out)

I am using role SAP_BR_MAINT_SUPERVISOR as the main role with full access.

How do I make sure the buttons (Accept/Reject) are greyed out for display-only users?

Any documentation links, screenshots, or step-by-step help would be highly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: Issue Creating Custom Transactions ZIQ01 and ZIQ02 for Standard Transactions IQ01 and IQ02
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am attempting to create two custom transactions (ZIQ01 and ZIQ02) that will call the standard SAP transactions IQ01 and IQ02, respectively. Our goal is to have these custom transactions act as wrappers for the standard ones.

The reason for this approach is that our current authorization concept is not fully refined. As part of our interim solution, we intend to completely block the standard transactions (IQ01 and IQ02) via SM01, and instead allow access only through the custom transactions (ZIQ01 and ZIQ02). This would also simplify role assignments across the organization by enabling us to work solely with the Z-transactions in authorization roles.

To implement this, I used transaction SE93 and tried the following methods:

  1. Creating the custom transactions as copies of the standard ones.

  2. Using the options "Program and screen (dialog transaction)" and "Program and selection screen (report transaction)" (see attached screenshot).

However, none of these approaches worked. Each time, I encounter a system error stating that the new transaction must be maintained in table T370. I have not been able to find any official SAP Note or documentation that explains how to configure this table appropriately.

Could anyone advise on:

  • The correct procedure for creating wrapper transactions for IQ01 and IQ02?

  • Whether configuration of table T370 is mandatory for this purpose, and if so, how it should be maintained?

  • Any SAP Notes or best practices related to this kind of setup?

Thank you very much for your support and guidance.

Best regards,
Osvaldo

entry.title: anybody knows about tcode IBIPA sap plant maintenance and what are the working of this tcode
Notification for work order Clean Up
entry.content:
Hi Gurus!

 

I would just like to check if we have a clean up functionality in SAP for notifications where the workorders are already closed.

The reason why this happens is because the business uses Fiori in closing work orders which then gets passed to ECC so the notifications are not getting closed even though work order is closed.

We could do a dev in fiori to also close the notification but for those that were already affected, how can we do a clean up of notifications?

entry.title: Requirement for User Exit/BAdI to Prevent Diesel Reservations for Surplus Equipment in IW31/IW32
entry.content:
Description:
We need to implement a control mechanism during maintenance order creation/change (transactions IW31/IW32) to prevent diesel (material) reservations for surplus equipment. Specifically, we are looking for a suitable User Exit or BAdI that can intercept the save logic, validate the equipment status, and check the material component data before the reservation is created.

Please advise on the appropriate enhancement point where we can perform this validation, ideally before the reservation is committed to the database.

entry.title: Cause Code Filtering Not Working Based on Damage Code in Notification
entry.content:
Issue Description:
In the PM Notification screen, when entering a malfunction:

  • If a specific Object Part and Damage Code (e.g., Engine → Blow By) is selected,

  • The Cause Code catalog should filter only causes related to that Damage (i.e., TIP-BLOW related causes).

However, the system currently displays all cause groups (e.g., TIP-BLOW, TIP-EXBS, TIP-OVER, etc.), regardless of the selected damage. This leads to incorrect cause selection and data inconsistency in breakdown analysis.

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Go to notification creation screen (IW21/IW22).

  2. Select:

    • Object Part: TIPPER-1 – Engine

    • Damage: TIP-ENG → Blow By

  3. Open Cause selection.

  4. Observe all causes are visible, not filtered to just TIP-BLOW.

Expected Behavior:
Only causes from the selected Damage Group should be displayed — in this case, only TIP-BLOW.

Screenshot: (Attach the image you provided)

In standard SAP, filtering Cause Codes based on the selected Damage Code is possible or not.

entry.title: Serial numbers for refurbishment
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to send two materials to the subcontractor for refurbishment. But the serial number button tab is not appearing in the quantities tab of work order. Also the serial number field is greyed out in the objects tab of work order.  Can you please help me on this?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: Task list operation: component assignment (OSS note 488765 Do-it-yourself EWB programming refer)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Has anyone had the opportunity to work with the above OSS note while dealing with the component assignment to a task list operation?
I was trying to follow the note suggestions about placing break-points in the methods (Service functions in CMCL Function Group) but not working.

Any help is highly appreciated, with the goal to have an ABAP code to massively perform the components allocation to operations in task lists.

Thank you!

entry.title: The Expected value field in PM order is not editable after creating the purchase order
entry.content: The Expected value field in Plant Maintenance order External components/services are not editable after creating the purchase order

entry.title: Cost issue with refurbishment orders
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have refurbished a material from valuation type C(Defective) to valuation type B(refurbished).

B Refurbished Moving Average Price 300 Stock 1

C  Defective Moving Average Price 100 Stock 1

Price of service 50

Why the gain loss is showing as -150 instead of 0. As the amount spent on refurbishment and the C condition material are both completely consumed in inventory at B condition?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: PM Notifications in QMSM table
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please let me know why some PM notifications are appearing under QMSM table?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: MPP component section of the work Order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How to default Maintenance Plant in component section of Work Order?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: External work centers to our operations in the work order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we assign external work centers to our operations in the work order

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: Notification with Outstanding Task and not there in QMSM table
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are unable to close the notification and it does not appear in QMSM table. In QMEL table we could see that MAKNZ is blank. Is this due to data discrepancy. 

Can we do the configuration to activate tab 10\TAB11 for notification type in (SPRO - Set Screen Templates for Notification Type) and delete the items in Notification and revert the changes back.

Or can we follow SAP Note 1747597 and do the configuration and delete the items in Notification and revert the changes back.

Regards,

Jaya
